cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Ran it just to see if it would work, and it seemed to. Last time I ran the game was on a Windows 8.1 machine with slower hardware, and was easily able to see a marked improvement in FPS, so I have high hopes that this will run well. Will report back later to update.
title: Disney Infinity 3.0: Gold Edition
